violations: Gate 2 — start_commit is set to the implementation commit itself (a58733d); git diff --name-only a58733d..HEAD returns only 4 doc files — none of the planned touchpoints (cmd/sworn/top.go, cmd/sworn/main.go) appear. proof.md 'Not delivered' incorrectly claims 'None' instead of acknowledging this. Fix: set start_commit to e3b0ec2 (immediately before the feat commit); update proof.md 'Files changed' accordingly.

Gate 3 — All 7 tests in top_test.go call renderEvidenceSurface directly, bypassing the CLI entry point cmdTop. The spec requires 'Integration: sworn top against a fixture release with mixed journey statuses (Rule 1 via the command entry point).' The codebase convention (explicit in lint_ac_test.go: 'drives the actual command entry point (cmdLintAC), not just the ears package') requires the integration test to call cmdTop. Fix: add at least one test calling cmdTop([]string{"<release>", dir}) exercising the mixed-statuses path.
